prestazioni: Engine: 4.0L V8 twin-turbo (EA839 / 9A2) with upgraded **Garrett GTX5533R** turbos (1.3 bar peak boost) and **Precision Turbo & Engine 7675** billet compressor wheels for reduced lag and 850+ WHP on E85 fuel. Supporting mods include **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (10.5:1 CR)**, **Carrillo H-beam connecting rods**, and **ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs** for cylinder sealing under extreme boost.

Fuel System: **Bosch Motorsports 2,200cc port injectors** paired with **Fuelab Prodigy V4 lift pumps** and a **Radium Engineering dual-catch can system** to prevent oil dilution. **AEM Infinity 8 ECU** with custom **Porsche 9A2-specific flex-fuel mapping** for seamless E85 transitions, backed by **Motec PDM15** for power distribution and fail-safe monitoring.

Exhaust & Induction: **Fabspeed Motorsport Valvetronic Sport Cats** (304 stainless, 3.5" diameter) with **Akrapovic Ti-Evo** rear section (titanium, 4.5" outlets) for weight savings and aggressive tone. **Eventuri Carbon Fiber intake system** with **K&N high-flow conical filters** and **custom 3D-printed velocity stacks** to optimize airflow into the **Porsche-designed twin-scroll manifolds**.
estetica: Aero: **TechArt GTstreet RS Sport Turismo widebody kit** (carbon fiber, 40mm rear fender flares) with **Vorsteiner V-RT front splitter** (adjustable dive planes) and **Rocket Bunny GT-spec rear diffuser** (integrated titanium exhaust outlets). **Porsche Motorsport GT3-spec carbon fiber rear wing** (adjustable angle, 30% more downforce at 180 mph).

Wheels & Suspension: **HRE FF16 FlowForm wheels** (21x10.5" front, 21x12.5" rear, ET35/ET25) in **Forgeline CBR finish**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** (275/30/21 front, 325/25/21 rear). **KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way coilovers** (10-position rebound, 12-position compression, 15mm adjustable ride height) with **Porsche PASM bypass valves** for track compliance.

Interior & Details: **Recaro Sportster CS full-bucket seats** (carbon-Kevlar shell, FIA 8862-2009 certified) with **Schroth 6-point harnesses**. **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel** (suede, 350mm diameter, Alcantara airbag cover) and **Motec C127 dash logger** (integrated with AEM Infinity). **Custom carbon fiber headliner** (matching exterior weave) and **LED door sills** with **Porsche Turbo S Sport Turismo script** in **BBS Motorsport font**.
